name: MJ Hegar
subject: Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. A fighter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f25/7f51f7bc/45355ed6/4efa7103/202683992/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | There are so many words that could be used to describe Ruth Bader Ginsburg, but the best I can think of is this: a fighter.

She leaves behind an incredible legacy -- one of standing up for equality and justice for all Americans. It is thanks to her that we have many of the freedoms that we hold so dear, and we take tonight to reflect, honor, and grieve for the loss of such a fighter.

Tomorrow, we will be strong, and we'll fight to honor her legacy and protect our democracy -- just as Justice Bader Ginsburg fought all the way to the end.

But tonight -- let us reflect on the life of an incredible woman who we were lucky enough to share time with.

Grieve tonight, and fight tomorrow. \-- MJ **P.S.[If you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time. The Supreme Court is on the ballot.](mjfortexas.com)**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f25/7f51f7bc/45355ed6/4efa7102/202683992/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2148&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f25/7f51f7bc/45355ed6/4efa7101/202683992/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

*IN CASE YOU MISSED IT*
We are honored to have the President's continued support!

Our district deserves better representation, and that is why we need Scott in Congress. Scott will advocate for policies that improve the lives of Virginians and Americans everywhere.

Thank you, President Trump, for your support and endorsement.

We are campaigning day-in and day-out to ensure that our district sends Scott to Congress! Meanwhile, we need your support now. With just 45 days to election day, there is no time to wait to get involved.

We ask you to please consider making a contribution to our campaign right now - of any amount! $5, $15, $50 donations all add up quickly and are critically impactful. Please join us now!!

body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Peter, Earlier this week, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell emailed you about my campaign. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it.

Working with President Trump, Leader McConnell is delivering results for our country. He’s helped deliver COVID relief, rolled back regulations, and passed President Trump’s historic tax cuts. And he’s confirmed more than 200 federal judges who are defending the Constitution — including two to the Supreme Court.

Our opportunity to continue delivering depends on keeping the Republican Senate majority. Can you imagine how much damage the Democrats will do if they have the House AND Senate?

Here’s where we come in: The radical left knows that taking back the Senate hinges on stopping me in New Hampshire.

And that’s where you come in. We’re fighting every day, but President Trump, Leader McConnell, and I need YOU with us. We can't win without you.

**[Will you rush a donation to defend the majority and flip this Senate seat for Republicans right now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/369958fdaff67d90/2bda8dda1fa54452c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** \- Corky | |

My father knows you’re one of the hardest-working and most dedicated supporters, which is why he’s doing something HUGE to show his gratitude. He wants to invite YOU to enter to win a VIP trip to meet him in Washington, D.C. He’s always said his favorite part of being YOUR President is meeting the American Patriots who placed their faith in him four years ago, like YOU. We’re selecting a winner soon, so time is of the essence - enter NOW. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to win a chance to meet my father in Washington, DC on September 25th. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT If you win this EPIC trip: - We’ll cover your flight - We’ll put you up in my family’s FAVORITE hotel - You’ll get to bring a guest of your choice - AND, you’ll get to take a picture with the President. I’m sending my father the next round of Patriots who enter the contest soon - will he see your name? Please Contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to enter to win and to get on my father’s next list of entries. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. by texting “WASHINGTONDC” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between September 5, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on September 20, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) and receive a photo opportunity with Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Week in review
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

I was so sorry to hear of the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg last night. No matter our political differences, she was a trailblazer and led a life deserving of our fullest respect. Please join me in praying for her family during this difficult time.

There was a lot that happened in the campaign this week,[](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=e6aa15d489&e=68aaeb0998) but the biggest news is that we released our second TV ad, entitled "Calvert!" I made this ad to honor all women who’ve made their voices heard. I’m proud of my grandmother, Calvert, for being the first woman elected to the Dallas City Council in 1957. She inspires me to work hard, be bold, and be honest.

If you haven't watched our new ad yet, [click here to watch it now! ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=fedf32fb0f&e=68aaeb0998)
---
|
---
| The endorsements continue to roll in as we get closer to Election Day. I recently was honored to receive the endorsement of the Log Cabin Republicans of Dallas.

This organization does remarkable work to strengthen the Republican LGBT community and build a more inclusive Republican Party.

I look forward to working with them when I'm in Congress.
---
|
---
| Finally, I want you to know that I signed the "Back the Blue" pledge.

You can always count on my unwavering support for public safety and those who put their lives on the line to protect our communities.

The Dallas City Council's plan to cut our police budget is unacceptable, as is Colin Allred's deafening silence on the issue. Your choice in this race is clear.

That wraps it up for this week's campaign update. I hope you have a great weekend and I look forward to seeing you out there on the campaign trail!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---
| | | | | | [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=d14aa78430&e=68aaeb0998)

No matter our political differences, she was a trailblazer and led a life deserving of our fullest respect. Please join me in praying for her family during this difficult time. There was a lot that happened in the campaign this week, but the biggest news is that we released our second TV ad, entitled "Calvert!" I made this ad to honor all women who’ve made their voices heard. I’m proud of my grandmother, Calvert, for being the first woman elected to the Dallas City Council in 1957. She inspires me to work hard, be bold, and be honest. If you haven't watched our new ad yet, | | The endorsements continue to roll in as we get closer to Election Day. I recently was honored to receive the endorsement of the Log Cabin Republicans of Dallas. This organization does remarkable work to strengthen the Republican LGBT community and build a more inclusive Republican Party. I look forward to working with them when I'm in Congress. | | Finally, I want you to know that I signed the "Back the Blue" pledge. You can always count on my unwavering support for public safety and those who put their lives on the line to protect our communities. The Dallas City Council's plan to cut our police budget is unacceptable, as is Colin Allred's deafening silence on the issue. Your choice in this race is clear. That wraps it up for this week's campaign update. I hope you have a great weekend and I look forward to seeing you out there on the campaign trail! Thank you and God bless, | | Genevieve Collins Republican Nominee Texas Congressional District 32 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC | | Copyright © 2020 COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC., All rights reserved.

name: Betsy Rader
subject: This event is far out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Join me on September 27th for Betsy 's Amazing Race!** [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KIy66RClpuV5EVb53MaXnKOLV6Jp8IFJiDTqrGyE6oA=) or contact Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/f2prevMFM2AzXpjtl0oZ8drTWInvrQ5M9hkiPpvpvxE=?subject=Betsy's%20Amazing%20Race)) Details below.. **I grew up working at a race track,** **and now I 'm in a competitive race for State Senate. So let's make it fun!** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KIy66RClpuV5EVb53MaXnKOLV6Jp8IFJiDTqrGyE6oA=) **What is it?** 1\. A fun activity on a Sunday afternoon 2\. A great way to spend time with family and explore our district 3\. An easy way to support my race for State Senate Grab your family and hop in the car. You'll begin at the starting line with your first clue. Solve puzzles that lead to locations and more clues. Finish and find out if you had the most points to win! **Date:** September 27th **Time:** You will be assigned a start time between 2 and 3 pm **Location:** Meet and begin at the Geauga Democratic Headquarters (2420 Kinsman Rd, Newbury Township, Ohio) then use your car to follow clues to locations around State Senate District 18! We want everyone to be safe on the road. Winners will be chosen for best team name and best decorated "racecar!" Fastest time does not mean you win! Take it slow and enjoy State Senate District 18! _(For racecar decor, feel free to take some inspiration from the photo above and make your car far out!)_ _**Tickets:**_ _All kids are free_ [Individual: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KIy66RClpuV5EVb53MaXnKOLV6Jp8IFJiDTqrGyE6oA=) [Multiple in a car: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KIy66RClpuV5EVb53MaXnKOLV6Jp8IFJiDTqrGyE6oA=) _(not including children-they 're free!)_ [Sponsor: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KIy66RClpuV5EVb53MaXnKOLV6Jp8IFJiDTqrGyE6oA=) [VIP: $500](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KIy66RClpuV5EVb53MaXnKOLV6Jp8IFJiDTqrGyE6oA=) **_ Hope to see you there!_** _-Betsy_
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/5skfv_2WIozO_trg5AJrFMZP6YcBzlPMVveqFJ4p1_4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/9QRQwYiw07Sttj2s2hiKdcnE662e0LqFew9Nu4mTVRw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/lgHz-Gt43c9_hagTff3lr0UlIDMgVM89fBFHmE29Zh0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ML8DANLuP4fsV8raQ526arYHW6KTuwWGEuRZXIDeee4=/KiPk2SzmsI9X2A47k_EvxT0w7p5NKKsY5LTzkAElzaI=)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19312345/252620312/-762162803?refcode=espy-fr-web-emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWUxNTQ2YS05Y2ZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fii9G-EzCjeWtraSDqUd_PTFbgdHNcoMlvICBuzXTDM=)

subject: Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
I call upon all of us to continue her fierce devotion to justice and keep her legacy alive. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=35961de307&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Last night our nation lost one of our greatest beacons of justice, Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

Etched in stone above the entrance to the Supreme Court are the words, "Equal Justice Under Law." Ruth Bader Ginsburg gave those words life. As an attorney, Justice Ginsburg was a pioneer for women’s equality. As a Supreme Court Justice, she continued that legacy, striking down laws that discriminated on the basis of gender, while also upholding justice in a wide variety of areas including disability rights, reproductive rights, environmental protection, and the electoral process.

Justice Ginsburg showed us the power of dissent. When a conservative majority of the Supreme Court gutted voting rights, upheld gender pay gaps, and denied women access to contraception, her voice rang out, "This is not just." She showed us the ability that each of us has to call out injustice and demand a better way.

As an attorney and educator, Justice Ginsburg holds a special place in my life and the roots of this campaign. Her commitment to justice and the rule of law is a model for the highest ideals of our nation. We must follow her lead and continue her work.

My heart and prayers are with Justice Ginsburg, her family, and our Nation. We will rise to this moment. It will take courage, grace, and resolve -- the very traits embodied by Justice Ginsburg. I call upon all of us to continue her fierce devotion to justice and keep her legacy alive.

Pat
---

name: Margaret Good
subject: Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19313935/252626964/-940294256?refcode=091920-es-rbg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGY1NDk2Ni1hM2ZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-evB89QpUFkv93C4zOtTBFt4JzgHGyCMBEWVd_k1r60=&emci=5f01774e-9efa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=9df54966-a3fa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

Last night, we lost a hero.
Friend,

Last night, we lost a hero.

Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a hero for women’s rights, a hero for civil rights, and a hero for our shared values. Not only was she a hero to so many, she was an inspiration to me, personally. She inspired me to study law, to speak out when I see injustice, and to fight for the things I care about.

Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg devoted her life to promoting equal rights under the law, from her days as a young attorney who burned the midnight oil as the architect for the legal fight for women’s equality, to her time on the Supreme Court — she stood up for all of us and our rights. Many of the rights she stood up for, we take for granted today, like the right for women to serve on juries, and the right to get a mortgage without your husband’s signature — it was not that long ago we were still fighting for basic rights like these.

She meant a lot to so many of us and to our democracy — we trusted her to defend our liberty and freedoms, and she will be so missed. As she said: “Fight for the things you care about, but do it in a way that leads others to join you.” She has taught us how to fight, now, it’s up to us.

Together, we can defend her life’s work by using our voice and our vote — and we must, because there’s so much at stake.

I hope you’ll join me in honoring her life’s work and doing your part to carry on her legacy.

Margaret

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19313937/252626966/1073285021?refcode2=9df54966-a3fa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=5f01774e-9efa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=9df54966-a3fa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091920-es-rbg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGY1NDk2Ni1hM2ZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-evB89QpUFkv93C4zOtTBFt4JzgHGyCMBEWVd_k1r60=)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

clean_body: Last night, we lost a hero. Friend, Last night, we lost a hero. Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a hero for women’s rights, a hero for civil rights, and a hero for our shared values. Not only was she a hero to so many, she was an inspiration to me, personally. She inspired me to study law, to speak out when I see injustice, and to fight for the things I care about. Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg devoted her life to promoting equal rights under the law, from her days as a young attorney who burned the midnight oil as the architect for the legal fight for women’s equality, to her time on the Supreme Court — she stood up for all of us and our rights. Many of the rights she stood up for, we take for granted today, like the right for women to serve on juries, and the right to get a mortgage without your husband’s signature — it was not that long ago we were still fighting for basic rights like these. She meant a lot to so many of us and to our democracy — we trusted her to defend our liberty and freedoms, and she will be so missed. As she said: “Fight for the things you care about, but do it in a way that leads others to join you.” She has taught us how to fight, now, it’s up to us. Together, we can defend her life’s work by using our voice and our vote — and we must, because there’s so much at stake. I hope you’ll join me in honoring her life’s work and doing your part to carry on her legacy. Margaret = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Remembering her legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Our nation experienced a profound loss last night. Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a beacon of light and a force for justice. Her fight was our fight and her memory will not be forgotten.

While today we mourn her passing, tomorrow we must continue to push for change so that all Americans are protected equally under the law.

It was Justice Ginsburg's final wish that she should not be replaced until we have a new president. We must do everything in our power to honor this request. Anything less is hypocritical and short-sighted.

Ruth Bader Ginsburg, you changed this country for the better. Rest in power.

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We will not let her legacy be tarnished
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8160%2E868730%2E0ntNrj) Friend, We have lost one of America's greatest patriots. Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg's enormous legacy cannot be measured in a single decision or case but in the totality of her tremendous life. She was our greatest champion for upholding women's access to health care, voting rights, and equality under the law for the LGBTQ community. Our heartbreak at the loss of Justice Ginsburg -- already a tragedy for the ages -- will increase exponentially if the U.S. Senate confirms a new justice before the American people decide on our next president. Decades of progress could be lost, and it could be detrimental to millions of lives. And it would be the height of hypocrisy for Mitch McConnell to allow it. Remember when he stole President Obama's last Supreme Court justice by refusing to allow the Senate to vote? McConnell has already committed to bringing President Trump's nominee to a vote anyway -- a promise he made just a few hours after Justice Ginsburg passed last night. I hope there are enough Republicans left in the Senate who have the integrity to block this Trump appointment. The voice of the American people will be heard, and we will not allow this seat to be filled -- and RBG's legacy to be tarnished -- by Donald Trump's hateful agenda. That commitment is what will spur my action for the next 45 days. I hope it will inspire yours, too. Very truly yours, Jay
---

name: Josh Hicks
subject: The legacy of Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
I’m deeply saddened by the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19315867/252634099/-1191128446?refcode=fl_email_non_20200919RBG_JH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJmNTc1Ni1hZWZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtIv5jG76KJWKeFFfZT2X46dCHDsz9WrBuagFKOVH-0=)
| | Friends — I’m deeply saddened by the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Justice Ginsburg was a tremendous jurist, and a true trailblazer for generations of women in the law. When I think about her legacy and her accomplishments, I think of my ambitious young daughter. I’m so proud that she feels the confidence to pursue any path or profession she wishes, and I know how much we owe to Justice Ginsburg for helping blaze that trail and make any dream a possibility for so many young women. As a former police officer and a practicing attorney, I have a tremendous amount of respect for our judiciary. The Constitution requires our judges to be apolitical, unbiased, and to take each case as it comes without any predispositions. That’s something we always saw from Justice Ginsburg. She was a fair jurist who took each case on its merits and weighed her decisions carefully without regard for political bias or partisan outcomes. **As we mourn and reflect in this moment, we must choose to honor Justice Ginsburg’s legacy by continuing to fight for equitable treatment under the law for every person in our country. And we must ensure that our judiciary retains its independence and unbiased nature — a critical issue in this election.** We must continue her work breaking down barriers of sexism, racism, and discrimination so that everyone can see themselves in the fabric of America — from the halls of Congress, to the chambers of the Supreme Court, to the Oval Office. Together, we will press on. Josh | | [**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19315868/252634100/-1191128446?refcode=fl_email_non_20200919RBG_JH_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjJmNTc1Ni1hZWZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtIv5jG76KJWKeFFfZT2X46dCHDsz9WrBuagFKOVH-0=)

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a trailblazer, a champion for equality, and a role model to many. I am thinking of her family and the many people who looked up to her and loved her. May she rest in peace.
-- Mark Warner
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881326/4173319322/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

As Mark Warner continues to work hard to make life better for every Virginian, our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark is focused on now that the Senate is back in session this week.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* Mark voted early in Alexandria on Friday, September 18. No matter how you're planning to vote this year, the first step is making sure you're registered. Head over to **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881325/4173319322/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")** to check your registration status and find out how you can cast your ballot.

* In a letter addressed to the CEOs of telecom companies such as AT&T, T-Mobile and Verizon, **[Mark requested a temporary suspension of overage fees](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881324/4173319322/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.theverge.com/2020/9/11/21432866/elizabeth-warren-mark-warner-att-tmobile-verizon-overage-fees-students-pandemic")** and data caps. As students participate in virtual schooling due to the pandemic, limited bandwidth severely hinders their learning during an already stressful time.

* [**Mark is sounding the alarm**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881323/4173319322/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.politico.com/news/2020/09/09/warner-election-security-410897") about Russian misinformation being spread on social media. As Election Day draws nearer, he warns that Congress isn't doing enough to pass election security legislation in order to combat misinformation. Mark is doing all that he can to keep our elections fair and free of foreign interference.

* This week, Mark's campaign launched a full Spanish campaign website and released [**a new Spanish language radio ad, "Conozco."**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881322/4173319322/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-campaign-debuts-spanish-language-radio-ad-new-spanish-language-campaign-website/") Take a look!

* The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) [**is proposing cutbacks to the Lifeline Program for low-income consumers**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881321/4173319322/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cbs42.com/washington/washington-dc/democrats-demand-action-from-the-fcc-to-support-lifeline-program-for-low-income-americans/"), which gives millions of Americans discounts on broadband access. In a time when an unprecedented number of Americans are relying on internet access for virtual learning, telehealth, and to work remotely, Mark is demanding that the FCC continue to provide affordable broadband in low-income communities during the pandemic. He will push for more broadband legislation in the next COVID-19 relief package.

* The U.S. House of Representatives passed _The IoT Cybersecurity Improvement Act_ , legislation that sets **[minimum security standards for devices](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c881320/4173319322/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://federalnewsnetwork.com/cybersecurity/2020/09/house-passes-bipartisan-iot-security-bill-to-fix-glaring-gap-in-cyber-infrastructure/")** connected to federal networks. This marks a major step forward in Mark's work to close the "glaring gap in cybersecurity infrastructure" over the past three years.

> -- Up next, the bill goes to the Senate, where Mark hopes it will be voted for approval.
* [**Mark continues to demand**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c88132f/4173319322/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-colleagues-call-on-postmaster-general-to-reverse-operational-changes-at-usps/") that Postmaster General Louis DeJoy reverse the changes made to the United States Postal Service in order for Americans to maintain consistent access to medication during the pandemic. The results of his decisions have resulted in delays of life-saving prescriptions.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c88132e/4173319322/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200919_e_1_fl__801__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c88132d/4173319322/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa5/53d9897e/55e6a8e3/1c88132c/4173319322/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
You’ve got options -- but it’s important that you make a plan on how you’ll cast your vote this year. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

How are you planning to vote this year?

_If you already applied for an absentee ballot, it's probably on the way! _

_And if you’re planning to vote early in-person — that starts in just over two weeks on Oct. 6._
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4b6ceb4526e14cabbe6b45a30e994fee&_e=6P4C7c9ozY7IBTFPANRFGXbymh7xbm728auuBY_6RVWZU3O50v7LMphEpwmSTk-PPLGDvu3rIqkgJOKr1DZffEygh4yTzwDohOYRz8xN47Wc0it_eGLSlgCj4vc3oYFWohsISIAgYoyjyyjyAD3UfOQa8Bk_tFLUl5JJo2g1wXN-JlAWbz9-vzQx4JrnXXkZdAyabOTQzNMpFQQBLrGdO7VqEgKkRGIyMy1THF3NpCsUunaF7imZyx3FQryiDnUuqsGIpQDZCuwRih6Z-5Uiwj6ISjw6EleAfJGUvL2ZX_j_lcWxJjsAj0yLcCONRKmuaDCe9Tdr53vpAjyIiGQLmt6r52oXVYxujOUqIQYFXlnCMXK-0YOSYBIowil-KRvdb170xQEO_a_X2Ys6kZE-xOUBgvGizzlUGEEgq8M64yuh67h6QzNbgOf8BiVkzeTnJo379BqtGq_Ha6Pf-kqWfg%3D%3D)
If your absentee ballot arrived, be sure to follow the instructions on it and submit — we’re relying on you to come through for us.

**If you’ve requested a ballot and it hasn’t come yet, make sure you keep an eye out for it! **

body:
Early voting in Illinois kicks off next Thursday – locate your polling place and register to vote here before it’s too late! | |
---
|

Friend,

**The finish line to this marathon of a race is finally in sight.**

November is still a few weeks away, but we’ll be able to vote early in-person here in Illinois as soon as **Thursday, September 24th,** meaning it’s time for us to make sure that all Illinoisians are ready to cast their ballots.

_We’ll need all hands on deck down the homestretch if we’re going to win this fight to root out political corruption here in Illinois and root out Nancy Pelosi’s out-of-touch leadership in DC!_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: What We’ve Lost and What We Have to Gain
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/91b6660bc361/what-weve-lost-and-what-we-have-to-gain?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | We knew this election cycle would be riddled with crises and challenges.

We have, all of us, met each one with aplomb, knowing that the arc of justice would prevail, that righteousness was on our side.

The loss of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg yesterday is devastating. We have lost a titan of justice. For so many of us, RBG felt like the dam holding back the worst. Her opinions and her influence have been a force for equality and her loss on the Court means that a critical voice for women, immigrants, queer folx, and democracy itself will now be silent

But her legacy will live on: the progress for which she fought doggedly, tirelessly, and passionately IS her legacy, and it is up to each and every one of us to take it up and carry the torch of freedom.

So many of you woke up this morning and thought, “What else can I be doing?”

For those of you who’ve resolved to do more, we need you. We have 45 days until the election and we need you to make calls to persuadable voters, to make donations at your capacity, and to show up for democracy.

Let each of our voices be louder and stronger for having been amplified by hers. And let each of us redouble our efforts to ensure the progress that is her legacy will be carried on and not undone. Let the forces of justice and righteousness be stronger than the forces of tyranny and oppression.

This country is counting on every one of us.

Yours,
Dani
---

FLIP THE SENATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f27/7f51f7bc/45ce986a/4efa73b7/198593314/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.1nd__2150__&amount=10")
---
"There **should not be a hearing** in the Judiciary Committee for anyone that the President nominates."

\-- Senator John Cornyn, February 2016
[DONATE TO SEND MITCH MCCONNELL PACKING](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f27/7f51f7bc/45ce986a/4efa73b7/198593314/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.1nd__2150__&amount=10")
---
"It's not about the personality, it's about the principle ... that **it's up to the American people in this next election** , no matter who they choose, to make the nomination for this important seat on the Supreme Court."

\-- Senator John Cornyn, February 2016
[DONATE TO DEFEND THE SUPREME COURT](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f27/7f51f7bc/45ce986a/4efa73b7/198593314/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.1nd__2150__&amount=10")
---
"My view is that this is not about the potential nominee; it's about who chooses. And I believe strongly **this should be a referendum on who chooses in November**."

\-- Senator John Cornyn, February 2016
[DONATE TO
PROTECT ROE v. WADE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f27/7f51f7bc/45ce986a/4efa73b7/198593314/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.1nd__2150__&amount=10")
---
"At this critical juncture in our nation's history, **Texans and the American people deserve to have a say** in the selection of the next lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court."

\-- Senator John Cornyn, March 2016
[DONATE TO
ELECT MJ HEGAR](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f27/7f51f7bc/45ce986a/4efa73b7/198593314/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.1nd__2150__&amount=10")
---

**Now, John Cornyn is going back on all of it to fall in line with Mitch McConnell and bring Donald Trump 's SCOTUS nominee to a vote.**
**[Don't let him get away with it >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f27/7f51f7bc/45ce986a/4efa73b7/198593314/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.1nd__2150__&amount=10")**

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Are you ready for tomorrow?
body:
| | Peter, Tomorrow, Sunday September 20, is National Voter Registration Sunday. If you and your church plan to participate to help others at your church register to vote, thank you! We are grateful for your leadership. If your church is not participating, it’s not too late. You can host a virtual or in-person voter drive at any time. Access all the free non-partisan materials for your church [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=b89pcBWfqomImHZ-KDvKKqyQXvgP2B0r-DiaA7cCi7JSQTfy5zVLgjXXRxVs1Dk1&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=1), including videos, sample sermons, media graphics, study guides, party platforms, and more. **You have a vital role to play. Please pray for Christians, in churches across the country to put their faith into action and register to vote this November.** Voter registration deadlines are quickly approaching and there are an estimated 15 million Christians who are not even registered to vote. In most states, people must register now if they want to vote on November 3. Are there believers in your life that you could help register to vote? We implore you to think of three people you could share the Personal Voting Assistant tool with today. The[ Personal Voting Assistant](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Lywr6AvH6rr-WqnoIVZ1slPq1IAPSi6L9MmvfstRW8WQKFtKwGrMDUz5kbn8G4kgSU7m42ETUA21vyEX4oOimeM8nYy3dIBkn4Jpk2HJwPBQw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=2) helps you:
* Register to vote
* Request an absentee ballot
* Receive voting reminders

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Lywr6AvH6rr-WqnoIVZ1slPq1IAPSi6L9MmvfstRW8WQKFtKwGrMDUz5kbn8G4kgSU7m42ETUA21vyEX4oOimeM8nYy3dIBkn4Jpk2HJwPBQw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=3) Thank you for uniting with us tomorrow in prayer for churches across the country to encourage their congregations to register to vote. **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=4)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=5)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200919com01&n=10)

name: Travis Brimm, People for Ben
subject: mourning a great American hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd09/3609356899/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "http://www.benraylujan.com/")

| |
Today, America mourns the loss of a great American hero.

Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a trailblazer and a ferocious champion for justice who fought to make our world a fairer and more equal place for all.

During her final days, Justice Ginsburg's most fervent wish was not to be replaced until after the next inauguration. As we come to terms with this loss, we must get ready to fight for the future of the Supreme Court and ensure that it reflects the will of the American people.

_[That's why now -- even as our grief weighs heavily on our souls -- I'm asking you to stand with Ben Ray and make a contribution to win back our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd0e/3609356899/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-rbg-em?refcode=dd_20200919_txt_fr&amount=25&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")_

Last night, within minutes of Justice Ginsburg's passing, Mitch McConnell announced that he would ignore the example _he set_ in 2016 and hold a vote on President Trump's next Supreme Court nominee.

We've seen the nominees on President Trump's list. They stand against the progress we've spent years fighting for, and their appointment to the court would drag our country back in time on civil rights, health care, racial justice, and the values we hold dear.

Ben Ray's opponent supports President Trump's nominees -- and he has vowed to only confirm judges who would undermine a woman's right to choose.

**With the stakes this high, we cannot afford to leave anything up to chance.**

Within the last several weeks, new polling has come out showing this race closer than ever, and a super PAC has begun major spending against our campaign.

**New Mexico is the cornerstone of our path to a Democratic Senate majority. We can win this race, but we need your help -- and we need it now.**

_[Now is the time to stand together and fight. As we mourn the loss of Justice Ginsburg, will you make a gift to help Ben Ray win this race and take back the Senate for the American people?](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd0e/3609356899/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-rbg-em?refcode=dd_20200919_txt_fr&amount=25&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")_

Thank you,

Travis Brimm
Campaign Manager
People for Ben |
---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd0f/3609356899/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd0c/3609356899/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd0d/3609356899/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As the U.S. House Representative from New Mexico's Third District, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by the American Federation of Teachers, Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd02/3609356899/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd03/3609356899/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd00/3609356899/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd0c/3609356899/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b238/18e32a7f/4a8671c9/7b20dd01/3609356899/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.
---

body:
Friend, I promise I’ll keep this quick. I just got an update from my Finance Director, Alexis, and we are still $4,223 short of our mid-month fundraising goal.
Friend,

I promise I’ll keep this quick. I just got an update from my Finance Director, Alexis, and we are still $4,223 short of our mid-month fundraising goal. Can you chip in any amount now to help us close the gap? [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualewq32020?refcode=September**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19320970/252655465/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.19_b2_edpi_nonopeners-nd&refcode2=3a7653ba-cdfa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2NTNiYS1jZGZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nAR8iK3DAzBvt3dMrsXbqTuC_UcTqVTt-qsihGHCJc=)

**I’ll be honest: At this point in the race, there is simply no time to make up lost ground.** Falling short today means that tomorrow we have to decide where to make cuts in our campaign. With a new poll showing our race in a _dead heat_ , we can’t let that happen.

We are so close to winning this race and bringing real change to our community, but we have to work together. I would be so grateful for anything you can chip in -- even just $5 -- before midnight tonight.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualewq32020?refcode=September**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19320971/252655466/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.19_b2_edpi_nonopeners-nd&refcode2=3a7653ba-cdfa-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2NTNiYS1jZGZhLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nAR8iK3DAzBvt3dMrsXbqTuC_UcTqVTt-qsihGHCJc=)

name: Texans for Sri Kulkarni
subject: here's what we're not going to do, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Yesterday, GOP Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy held a private and mask-optional fundraiser to prop up Sri’s opponent Troy Nehls to his elitist buddies.

When the GOP establishment looks at Troy Nehls, they don’t see what we see. They don't see an extremist disgraced former police officer who was fired for multiple infractions -- including destroying evidence. They see another “YES” man to their special interest focused agenda -- and that’s all they care about.

So we need to help Sri fight back, friend. After yesterday’s fundraiser, Troy Nehls is now flush with cash from special interest backers. We need to help Sri’s grassroots-fueled campaign keep up so we can be ready to respond to any new attacks Nehls throws our way.

DONATE NOW → https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.19_b1_tfsk_all&amount=25

Troy Nehls should be talking to voters about his record -- but he can’t, because that record includes lying under oath and downplaying the coronavirus pandemic even as his own employees got sick.

So instead, he’s hiding from the public and from the prospect of debating us, choosing instead to rub elbows with Washington elites and special interests at private, in-person fundraisers.

Meanwhile, Sri Preston Kulkarni is focused on community outreach and building a grassroots network that will power real change -- and every TV ad or mailer our campaign puts out is funded by supporters like you.

We’re tired of having to compete against millions of dollars in outside interests in order to keep up a message about giving Americans the health care they deserve, and we’re tired of big money in our politics.

It’s time for a change in our community, friend -- and Sri will be that change.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg changed the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Honor Ruth's remarkable life. Honor what she fought for. Honor how she never gave up, no matter how hard the battle. And neither do we. We persist. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a5/45c30650/1c0360422/66e8f07f/2059054446/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This is hard. We lost an icon. She was a trailblazer, a role model, and a friend. Ruth Bader Ginsburg changed the world. I will miss her.

As a young mom heading off to Rutgers law school, I saw so few examples of female lawyers or law professors. But Ruth blazed the trail. She'd been teaching at Rutgers law school right before I got there. I'm forever grateful for her example -- to me, and to millions of young women.

Ruth's groundbreaking work as a legal advocate for women led to a distinguished career as a federal judge and a Supreme Court justice. Her lifelong dedication to fighting for justice for everyone, and her love for our nation, will be sorely missed.

With voting already underway for the 2020 election, Ruth's "most fervent wish" was for her replacement not to be named "until a new president is installed."

We must honor her wish.

But Mitch McConnell isn't listening. He has already made it clear that he and Donald Trump will try to name a new Supreme Court justice with only 45 days to the election. This is a last gasp of a desperate party that is over-represented in the halls of power; the last gasp of a corrupt Republican leadership that doesn't reflect the views of the majority of our people, or our values as a country.

But in a democracy, the _people_ still have power. And I am asking you to use it.

Honor Ruth's remarkable life. Honor what she fought for. Honor how she never gave up, no matter how hard the battle. And neither do we. We persist. So throw yourself into this fight like never before. Speak out. Make your voice heard. Vote, if you haven't already. Get your family, friends, and neighbors to vote, too. Use your anger. Use your pain. And use your power.

**[If you're able to, please make a donation to directly support the campaigns of Democrats running to flip Republican Senate seats. Control of the Senate is up for grabs-- and it's never been more critical.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a5/45c30650/1c0360422/66e8f07e/2059054446/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNlbmF0ZS1yMmItd2Vla2x5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYxNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwOTE3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-senate-r2b-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV14F_EGR_END_E_20200917_V1S1_P")**

\-- Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a5/45c30650/1c0360422/66e8f07e/2059054446/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNlbmF0ZS1yMmItd2Vla2x5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYxNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwOTE3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-senate-r2b-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV14F_EGR_END_E_20200917_V1S1_P")

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Honor Justice Ginsburg's wish |
---
Last night, perhaps you felt the same hurt in your heart that I did.

I was just sitting down with Alisha and family for Rosh Hashanah dinner when I got the news.

**Justice Ginsburg was a brilliant jurist. Her life's work made America truer to our founding principle of universal human rights.**

**She was an ardent champion for American women, advancing gender equality through both her jurisprudence and her personal example.**

To lose a giant such as Justice Ginsburg -- and on Erev Rosh Hashanah, of all nights -- it's a gut punch.

But now it's up to us to guard her legacy.

Justice Ginsburg left us with a message.

**_In her final days, she said, "My most fervent wish is that I will not be replaced until a new President is installed."_**
**_Friend, we must do all in our power to honor that wish._**
_For the sake of the millions whose health care is at risk, and with so much more on line -- with voting already underway and at a moment such as this -- we must let the people speak at the ballot box, and then let the Court reflect the will of the newly-elected President and Senate._

Within hours of her passing, without allowing even one holy evening for mourning, Mitch McConnell made the grim pronouncement that he would not only ignore Justice Ginsburg's final wish -- but he would shamelessly violate the precedent he set in 2016, when he refused to hold hearings on President Obama's Supreme Court nominee in an Election Year.

**None of this comes as a surprise. McConnell is a man unmoored from any guiding principle beyond the ruthless exercise of power.**

McConnell is a lost cause. But we will soon discover whether there is even a shred of integrity or principle left in his Republican caucus.

My opponent, Senator David Perdue, was adamant in 2016 that a Supreme Court Justice should not be nominated and confirmed in an Election Year.

**Will David Perdue show an ounce of moral integrity and stay true to the principles he claimed four years ago? Or will he bend as he always does to do the bidding of McConnell and the President?**

_Friend, it goes without saying that control of the Senate has never been more important!!!_

**Democrats need to win four seats to secure the majority --_and this race in Georgia is THE MOST COMPETITIVE in the country._**

The balance of the Supreme Court is at stake. The implications for future generations are profound.

Friend, we must take back the U.S. Senate.

Thank you for being part of this movement for a more just, prosperous, and perfect union.

With love,

Jon Ossoff

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Sign the petition: Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (<a href="http://demandprogress
body: Peter, I, like many of you, am swinging between grief, anger, and determination in the wake of RBG's passing and McConnell's unconscionable announcement that Republicans would rush to replace her. Too many news stories suggest there is nothing Democrats can do; they are wrong. Please read the email below and [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1001&akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3 ]sign the petition. The single most important person who can stop Trump appointing a Justice to replace RBG Is Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer. He needs to hear from you and the Senators who represent you. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1002&akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3 ]Please sign Demand Progress's petition right away. -- Zephyr Teachout -------------------------------------------------------------------------- The death of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg on Friday evening comes as a shock and a tragedy. We honor her forty years of pathbreaking service on the federal bench, including 27 years on the Supreme Court. Her dying wish was that her replacement not be confirmed until a new president has been installed.^1 Mitch McConnell just said he will not respect that wish and will instead hold a vote on Trump's nominee. But Senate Democrats have the power to stop them and save the Supreme Court. The Senate runs on unanimous consent. If a single Senator objects to anything, even routine procedure, everything grinds to a halt. That is what Senate Democrats must do: block unanimous consent on every single thing for the rest of the year. It may be our best chance to stop Trump and McConnell. Will you help? [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1003&akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3 ]Sign the petition: Shut down the Senate and stop Trump and McConnell from picking RBG's successor! This is a frankly terrifying moment. But there is a path forward. Senate Democrats have the power and the leverage to potentially prevent Trump and McConnell from deciding who will succeed Justice Ginsburg on the Supreme Court. Senate Democrats can block every motion, force every bill to be read in full, and use a wide range of parliamentary tactics to shut down the Senate between now and January, when new Senators and the president are inaugurated. The Senate still has work ahead, including bills Trump and McConnell want to pass, including bills to fund the government. It's time to block all of it. McConnell and Trump see this as their best, and perhaps last, opportunity to further stack the federal courts with extreme right-wing nominees who will cripple the next president. As tough a moment as this is, we have a chance to stop them -- if Democrats act firmly to shut down the Senate now. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1004&akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3 ]Add your name now: Tell Democrats to shut down the Senate and stop Trump and McConnell from picking RBG's successor! Thank you for taking action in this urgent moment, David and the team at Demand Progress [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/32965?t=1005&akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3 ]DONATE Sources: 1. NBC News, "Ruth Bader Ginsburg's dying wish: Not to have Donald Trump choose replacement," [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/32961?t=1006&akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3 ]September 18, 2020. ---------- PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (DemandProgress.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Join our online community on Facebook or Twitter. You can unsubscribe from this list at any time: http://act.demandprogress.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=27103%2E8104458%2Eq2y3N3

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: This race is so much more than a Senate seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
What we do right now matters.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f2/4237718109/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

Last night we lost a fighter and a giant for equality and justice. Today, we honor her legacy, and fight for all that is at stake. **[If you're already with us, please give what you can to help MJ win.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f1/4237718109/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")**

Mitch McConnell -- within minutes of Ruth Bader Ginsburg's death being made public -- announced his intention to bring President Trump's nominee to a vote. It took Sen. Cornyn less than two minutes to fall in line.

Appointing a Supreme Court Justice in McConnell's Senate will impact our lives for generations. Here's what's on the ballot this November:
1. **[Our reproductive freedom is on the ballot.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f1/4237718109/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")** A radically partisan Supreme Court could overturn Roe v. Wade and abolish the right to choose.

2. **[Our access to health care is on the ballot.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f1/4237718109/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")** The Administration has already requested the Supreme Court strike down the Affordable Care Act. If the ACA is repealed, that would wipe out health care coverage for as many as 23 million Americans _in the middle of a pandemic._

3. **[Our civil rights are on the ballot.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f1/4237718109/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")** An unbalanced Supreme Court could gut the Civil Rights Act, and LGBTQ Americans could lose the right to marry whomever they love.

4. **[Our voting rights are on the ballot.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f1/4237718109/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")** Cases to make it easier for people to vote during the pandemic are piling up on the steps of the Supreme Court. A lopsided Court could make it harder for Americans to make their voices heard at the ballot box.

**Peter, the Supreme Court is on the ballot this November.** What we do right now will make or break our ability to reach undecided voters that we need to win. **Can you pitch in to help MJ get elected?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f0/4237718109/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f7/4237718109/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f6/4237718109/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f5/4237718109/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f4/4237718109/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__")**
We've got 45 days to fight like hell to stop Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate. Each and every one of us wants to wake up on November 4th and feel we've done everything in our power to win this election and protect our democracy. Let's get to work.
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73f1/4237718109/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200919.2nd__2152__&amount=10")

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73eb/4237718109/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2152&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f21/7f51f7bc/45c7930c/4efa73ea/4237718109/VEsHAQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

"" A radically partisan Supreme Court could overturn Roe v. Wade and abolish the right to choose. 2. "" The Administration has already requested the Supreme Court strike down the Affordable Care Act. If the ACA is repealed, that would wipe out health care coverage for as many as 23 million Americans in the middle of a pandemic. 3. "" An unbalanced Supreme Court could gut the Civil Rights Act, and LGBTQ Americans could lose the right to marry whomever they love. 4. "" Cases to make it easier for people to vote during the pandemic are piling up on the steps of the Supreme Court. A lopsided Court could make it harder for Americans to make their voices heard at the ballot box. Peter, the Supreme Court is on the ballot this November. What we do right now will make or break our ability to reach undecided voters that we need to win. Can you pitch in to help MJ get elected? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" We've got 45 days to fight like hell to stop Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate. Each and every one of us wants to wake up on November 4th and feel we've done everything in our power to win this election and protect our democracy. Let's get to work. \-- Team MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

name: Christy Smith
subject: This is for Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Last night, we grieved. Today, we fight.

Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg understood that the fight for equality is not over, and she knew that the long arc of history bends toward justice _only when the people stand up for what is right._

She inspired generations of women in the law and in public life. She broke through barriers. She was an icon even before she joined the Court.

Now, with her passing, the Court is left with a void -- one that Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell will seek to fill before November's presidential election is decided, ignoring the precedent McConnell himself set four years ago. **We know that they will try.

[We must protect Ruth Bader Ginsburg's legacy by electing leaders who will champion reproductive rights, access to health care, and equality and justice under the law -- I swear that's exactly what I'll do in Congress. Please, pitch in $5 or more right now to help me get there.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6379/1910812522/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e637a/1910812522/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e637b/1910812522/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6374/1910812522/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6375/1910812522/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6376/1910812522/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6379/1910812522/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in")
Despite her own final wish that the next president appoint her successor, Trump and McConnell will seek to replace Justice Ginsburg with a radical conservative who will vote to strike down _Roe_ , overturn the Affordable Care Act, and enshrine white supremacy into the fabric of our nation in every way possible.

The consequences of this Supreme Court vacancy are that high. **We are in the fight of our lives, and this is the moment when the revolution _must_ win -- in Ruth Bader Ginsburg's name.**

We will fight like hell to honor her final wish,**but we are prepared for the reality that McConnell, Trump, and their allies like Mike Garcia will try to push a nominee through before Election Day.**

National Republicans have proven again and again that their only concern is rolling back the rights of women, LGBTQ Americans, people of color, and immigrants, and they will do whatever they have to to accomplish that goal.

**_It's time to Vote. Them. All. Out._

[But we'll start right here and right now with the virulently anti-choice Mike Garcia. Chip in $5 or more right now so we can send him packing and protect Justice Ginsburg's legacy.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6379/1910812522/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in")**

For RBG,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6379/1910812522/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcea/29776869/9658a83/569e6379/1910812522/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MTlfcmJnX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy?refcode=em20_200919_rbg_in")

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Climate, racial, and reproductive justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3057%2E53494%2ExCeGxE) Friend, | []()
---
Our hearts are broken.
Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a hero for gender equality, racial justice, and climate justice. Our marching orders are clear: We must carry forward her fight for a more just and bright future for everyone.
If Mitch McConnell refuses Justice Ginsburg's dying wish and retreats from his commitment not to confirm Supreme Court justices in a presidential election year, a new Senate -- elected in November -- must be ready to kill the filibuster, expand the court, and save our democracy and our planet.
These legislative and judicial reforms aren't nice-to-haves. With a worsening climate crisis -- displacing and killing millions around the world -- they are must-haves. Today, we mourn a giant. But in the coming weeks and months, our actions in support of climate, racial, and reproductive justice will be driven by her legacy.
With you in solidarity -- and in grief,
Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3057%2E53494%2ExCeGxE). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

| - Last night we got devastating news that Ruth Bader Ginsberg had passed. RBG was a champion of justice and fierce advocate for women's rights. It's not enough to just mourn her loss, we must protect her legacy.

Mitch McConnell cannot be allowed to ram through a nomination at a time where the Supreme Court may be the last line of defense for our democracy. Now is the time to make sure that you and your neighbor are registered to vote — the deadline is Oct 5th.

I need your help to reach out to every voter in this district so that we can take the House and the Senate.
